Idiom (Kwinti): A liba no e tyari wan taki nomo.

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: A situation has more than one side; one account is not the whole truth.

Third Example Sentence: A boi yere wan pisi tori, ma a liba no e tyari wan taki nomo.
